narrative:
Cols 42-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 236 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 1.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.6 percentage points.
